authority.data_policy: Only yusefnathanson@me.com recovered payload is retained in owner-specific ArtifactProgram; every other legacy disk is rollback-only and no data migration is claimed.
authority.signatures: runtime owner and G3 signatures remain mandatory; panel acceptance is not a signature

canary_order: retain/reverify existing synthetic control without mutation
remaining records by safety class and route ID
global_execution_contract.failure_policy: stop fleet immediately; complete current route rollback, disposal, exact restore, and restart readback before investigation
global_execution_contract.legacy_images: never constructor inputs; stat-only invariants during rollback window
global_execution_contract.rollback_boundary: every legacy bootstrap has paired signed generation-1 rollback-to-absence before CAS
global_execution_contract.serialization: strict one route at a time; next detach starts only after prior success acceptance or complete rollback/restore

plans.acceptance_condition: route version equals persisted construction version; disk receipt integrity and realization identity recompute; no CAS

plans.legacy_data_policy: owner-settled baseline reset; no legacy account data migration required
pre_cas_gates: owner approval bound to construction SHA-256
G3 signature over both plan digests

rollback_transition.rollback_target: deterministic generation-1 bootstrap receipt frozen by prepare-bootstrap

success_retention.candidate: becomes sole routed constructed ownership after exact readback
success_retention.legacy_state_directory: preserve unchanged through G5 acceptance and bounded rollback TTL

plans.legacy_data_policy: owner recovered payload ArtifactProgram
pre_cas_gates: owner approval bound to construction SHA-256
